markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Symfony

A list of awesome Symfony bundles, utilities and resources.

Table of contents:

  • Administration
  • Certification
  • Community
  • Development
  • Distributions
  • Ecommerce
  • Forms
  • Internationalization
  • Miscellaneous
  • Monitoring
  • Payments Management
  • Queues
  • Reading
  • Resources
  • Service Container
  • Storage
  • Template Engine
  • Third Party APIs
  • User Management
  • Validation
  • Web Services

Administration

  • AdminCrudBundlestars18 - AdminCrudBundle - Use SensioGeneratorBundle. Extend controller, add paginator, filter, others.
  • AdmingeneratorGeneratorBundlestars366 - Admingenerator for Symfony2, parse generator.yml files to build classes
  • EasyAdminBundlestars10 - Simple admin generator for Symfony applications
  • SonataAdminBundlestars2k - AdminBundle - The missing Symfony2 Admin Generator
  • AdminLTEBundlestars183 - Admin theme based on the AdminLTE Template
  • Umbrella frameworkstars49 - Admin components and theme to create administration backends.

Certification

  • CLI tool to train certificationsstars381
  • Symfony 3 certification guidestars145
  • Symfony certification preparation liststars467

Community

  • Facebook - notable, large and active Facebook groups:
    • 1
    • 2
  • Google+ - Large and active group on Google+.
  • IRC:
    • #symfony - Official IRC channel for Symfony support.
    • #symfony-docs - Channel to discuss about the documentation of Symfony.
  • Local:
    • Community events - Find Symfony events near you.
    • Meetup - Get involved locally and find Symfony users from your local area.
  • Telegram - Symfony group on Telegram.
  • Quora - Symfony topics on Quora.
  • Reddit - Ask and answer questions, discussion.
  • SensioLabs Connect - Developer social network, earn achievements for your community involvement and commitment.
  • Slack - Symfony on Slack, platform for team communication.
  • Stack Overflow - Symfony support on Stack Overflow.
  • Twitter - Keep up with Symfony news in a twitter-like way.

Development

  • AccessibleBundlestars12 - Define your class' getters, setters and constructor using powerful annotations.
  • ApiExceptionBundlestars63 - Exception API Bundle.
  • AvAjaxBundlestars1 - This bundle offers a simple structure to run ajax actions.
  • BeelabTestBundlestars14 - This bundle contains just an opinionated extension of Symfony WebTestCase.
  • CacheAdministrationBundlestars17 - This bundle includes a controller with actions to clear the various caches.
  • ControllerExtraBundlestars156 - Set of useful Controller annotations.
  • DunglasActionBundlestars268 - A replacement for the Symfony controller system based on the Action-Domain-Responder pattern.
  • http-bundlestars39 - Provides extra HTTP related functionality.
  • JMSDebuggingBundle - Provides advanced debugging tools.
  • LadybugBundlestars331 - The Simple and Extensible PHP Dumper.
  • LiipCodeBundlestars27 - A set of Symfony2 console commands to help developers deal with the various ways of identifying classes, templates, bundles, services, etc.
  • LiipFunctionalTestBundlestars606 - Some helper classes for writing functional tests in Symfony 2.
  • ListenersDebugCommandBundlestars62 - A console command to debug listeners.
  • ParamConverterBundlestars16 - This bundle provides additional param converters for Symfony.
  • PhpMetricsCollectorBundlestars55 - Integrates PhpMetrics in Symfony2 debug toolbar.
  • PsyshBundlestars155 - Provides an enhanced PHP interactive shell loaded with a Symfony context.
  • PUGXGeneratorBundlestars58 - An enhancement of SensioGeneratorBundle.
  • redaktilo-bundlestars6 - Integrates Redaktilo into Symfony 2.
  • SandboxBundlestars16 - Overriding controller logic & response in a Sandbox environment.
  • StatsDClientBundlestars163 - Easily monitor your symfony2 production env., with ready-to-use stats.
  • TagDebugCommandBundlestars8 - Integrate TagDebug library for inspecting and debugging tags.
  • TwigReflectionBundlestars15 - Displays what's in Twig.
  • WebfactoryExceptionsBundlestars61 - Easily develop custom, user-friendly error pages.
  • WebProfilerExtraBundlestars270 - Adding routing, container, assetic & twig information in the web profiler.
  • XhprofBundlestars212 - XHProf bundle.

Distributions

  • API Platform frameworkstars6.7k
  • Kunstmaan Bundles Standard Editionstars92
  • Symfony CMF Standard Editionstars118
  • Symfony Standard Editionstars1.5k

Ecommerce

  • Aimeos - Ultra fast PHP e-commerce framework for #gigacommerce
  • Bamboostars205 - Full-stack E-commerce application based on Symfony and Elcodi components
  • Elcodistars441 - E-commerce PHP Components and Symfony Bundles
  • Syliusstars6.3k - E-Commerce PHP framework built on top of Symfony with component-based architecture and format-agnostic rendering

Forms

  • CraueFormFlowBundlestars664 - Multi-step forms.
  • InfiniteFormBundlestars150 - A collection of useful form types and extensions.
  • IvoryCKEditorBundlestars341 - CKEditor integration in Symfony.
  • IvoryOrderedFormBundlestars50 - Provides a form ordering support.
  • KarserRecaptcha3Bundlestars57 - Integrates Google ReCAPTCHA v3 into Symfony.
  • LexikFormFilterBundlestars361 - Lexik Form Filter bundle.

Internationalization

  • BazingaJsTranslationBundlestars537 - A pretty nice way to expose your Symfony2 translation messages to your client applications.
  • JMSI18nRoutingBundle - Bundle for multilingual websites to support international routes.
  • JMSTranslationBundle - Translate your website with ease - extract messages & translate them via a web-based UI.
  • LexikTranslationBundlestars346 - Allows to import translation files content into the database and provide a GUI to edit translations.
  • LuneticsLocaleBundlestars187 - Guess the visitor’s locale from different parameters.
  • TimezoneBundlestars27 - Serverside Timezone detection.
  • TranslationFormBundlestars291 - Translation field to facilitate the use of the Translatable Doctrine extension.

Miscellaneous

  • AnhTaggableBundlestars6 - Bundle provides integration of doctrine-extensions-taggable, adds form types for editing tag and tagging.
  • AntennaBundlestars3 - Makes it easier to integrate Antenna (and through it JWT) authentication.
  • APYBreadcrumbTrailBundlestars70 - This bundle provides annotations and PHP methods to generate a breacrumb trail.
  • APYDataGridBundlestars452 - Datagrid Bundle.
  • AvAlertifyBundlestars0 - This bundle allows you to easily harmonize alerts and others notifications.
  • AviaryBundlestars4 - This bundle provides multiple file uploads, based on the BlueImp jQuery file uploader package. It provides also Aviary editing image functionnalities.
  • AvListBundlestars6 - Easily make paginate and orderable list in Symfony2.
  • BackupManagerBundlestars11 - A simple database backup manager for Symfony2 with support for S3, Rackspace, Dropbox, FTP, SFTP.
  • BazingaFakerBundlestars279 - Put the awesome Faker library into the Symfony2 DIC and populate your database with fake data.
  • BazingaGeocoderBundlestars285 - Integration of the Geocoder library.
  • BCCMyrrixBundlestars7 - Myrrix is a recommendation engine built on Apache Mahout libraries.
  • BGBarcodeBundlestars20 - Bundle for barcode rendering using our barcode generator base library.
  • BlogBundlestars33 - Simple blog module.
  • bootstrap-bundlestars410 - Integrates Bootstrap into Symfony2 by providing templates, Twig extensions, services and commands.
  • BreadcrumbsBundlestars190 - A small breadcrumbs bundle.
  • BrowscapBundlestars14 - Bundle to access the browscap information.
  • CacheToolBundlestars20 - Bundle to integrate cachetool library in Symfony2 (Clear acp/opcache from the command line).
  • CarbonBundlestars14 - This bundle provides an opportunity to convert Request data into Carbon objects.
  • CheckBundlesstars25 - Checks installed but not activated in AppKernel bundles.
  • CloudBackupBundlestars196 - Be able to backup your database(s) and upload it to the cloud.
  • ConsoleBundlestars137 - Commandline interface in browser.
  • EightPointsGuzzleBundlestars408 - Integrates Guzzle 6.x, a PHP HTTP Client, into Symfony 2-4 and provides plugins to extend basic functionality.
  • CsaGuzzleBundlestars247 - Bundle integrating Guzzle >=4.0 in Symfony.
  • CsvBundlestars9 - An integration for thephpleague/csv into Symfony.
  • DomainParserBundlestars0 - Integration of Domain Parser into Symfony.
  • EasyAuditBundle - This bundle provides audit logging for your application - works with Doctrine2 entities and allows logging selective events.
  • EmbedlyBundlestars2 - Bundle for the embed.ly library.
  • ExcelBundlestars382 - Excel integration in Symfony2 thanks to https://github.com/PHPOffice/PHPExcelstars11.4k library.
  • FeatureToggleBundlestars38 - Configure your feature toggling in Symfony2 by adding some simple tags to twig and extending it's configuration.
  • ffmpeg-bundlestars56 - This bundle provides a simple wrapper for the PHP_FFmpeg library, exposing the library as a Symfony service.
  • FlorianvSwapBundlestars55 - This Bundle integrates the Swap library.
  • FMBbCodeBundlestars56 - Adds BBCode support to Symfony project.
  • FMElfinderBundlestars236 - Provides Elfinder filebrowser integration with popular WYSIWYG editors.
  • GnugatWizardBundlestars22 - Magically shrinks bundle installation steps into a single command.
  • godfatherstars25 - A library for the strategy pattern in PHP.
  • guzzle-bundlestars102 - Integrates Guzzle.
  • highcharts-bundlestars3 - Integrates PHP Highcharts.
  • HTMLPurifierBundlestars4 - HTML Purifier is a standards-compliant HTML filter library written in PHP.
  • IbrowsWizardAnnotationBundlestars0 - Give's a Symfony2 controller a simple wizard/workflow with annotations.
  • ImageCropBundlestars13 - ImageCrop lets you crop images in Symfony applications, this bundle add a new form field type.
  • JMDUnoconvBundlestars0 - Bundle which provides gate for converting files from one format to another via unoconv (LibreOffice) thru php-unoconv library.
  • KayueEssenceBundlestars6 - This bundle integrates the Essence library (an oEmbed library) into Symfony 2.
  • KitpagesDataGridBundlestars77 - This bundle provides a simple datagrid bundle.
  • KnpMarkdownBundlestars410 - Wrapper for PHP markdown.
  • KnpSnappyBundlestars1.1k - Easily create PDF and images by converting html using webkit.
  • LexikMaintenanceBundlestars253 - This Symfony2 bundle allows you to place your website in maintenance mode by calling two commands in your console.
  • LiipImagineBundlestars1.4k - Image manipulation bundle, based on Imagine library.
  • LiipUrlAutoConverterBundlestars52 - Add a Twig Extension for templates with a new filter for automatically converting urls and emails in a string to html links.
  • marshaller-bundlestars0 - A PHP library that converts from one format to another.
  • metricsstars303 - Simple library that abstracts different metrics collectors.
  • MhorMediaInfoBundlestars6 - Integrates php-mediainfo library into the Symfony2 full-stack framework.
  • MobileDetectBundlestars394 - Bundle for detect mobile devices, manage mobile view and redirect to the mobile and tablet version.
  • MultiParamBundlestars16 - MultiParam Annotation Bundle.
  • ObHighchartsBundlestars160 - Aims to ease the use of highcharts to display rich graph and charts.
  • OneupUploaderBundlestars571 - Provides server implementations for several multi file uploader.
  • phone-number-bundlestars448 - Integrates libphonenumber.
  • prezent-grid-bundlestars5 - Integrate the prezent/grid library in Symfony2.
  • query-bus-bundlestars2 - QueryBus integration in Symfony.
  • rss-atom-bundlestars126 - RSS and Atom Bundle.
  • Search-SphinxsearchBundlestars42 - Sphinx search bundle.
  • SettingsBundlestars103 - Database centric configuration management. Global and per-user settings supported.
  • shorturl-bundlestars12 - Provides short URLs for your project.
  • SimpleArrayBundlestars2 - Symfony 2 bundle for simple tags management, based on doctrine 2 simple_array type.
  • sphinx-realtime-bundlestars5 - A bundle which automatically syncs Doctrine entities to a Sphinx real-time index.
  • SphinxsearchBundlestars27 - Provide to use Sphinx search.
  • StringGeneratorBundlestars17 - This bundle allows you to automatically generate a unique random string on an entity property, useful for creating keys.
  • TbbcCacheBundlestars36 - Cache abstraction bundle.
  • TbbcMoneyBundlestars178 - This bundle is used to integrate the Money library from mathiasverraes into a symfony2 project.
  • TemplatedUriBundlestars84 - Expose the hautelook/TemplatedUriRouter.
  • ThruwayBundlestars96 - Bundle for building Real-time Apps in Symfony.
  • timeline-bundlestars197 - Symfony2 bundle to make timeline.
  • TransmissionBundlestars4 - Bundle for Transmission API client.
  • versioning-bundlestars91 - Simple way to version (semantic versioning 2.0.0).
  • VisithorBundlestars15 - Symfony Bundle for PHP Package visithor.
  • WhiteOctoberPagerfantaBundlestars481 - Bundle to use Pagerfanta.
  • WidopFrameworkExtraBundlestars11 - Adds annotation configuration for Controller classes.
  • WozbeRedirectBundlestars5 - A short bundle to manage many domains.

Monitoring

  • LiipMonitorBundlestars452 - Bundle provides a way to run a series of application related health checks.
  • SoclozMonitoringBundlestars68 - A monitoring bundle for production servers

Payments Management

  • CartBundlestars101 - High quality cart for developers.
  • JMSPaymentCoreBundle - This bundle provides the foundation for various payment plugins.
  • JMSPaymentPaypalBundlestars124 - Payment Bundle providing access to the PayPal API.
  • MangopayBundlestars0 - Mangopay API implementation for Symfony2.
  • PaymentAdyenBundlestars6 - Provides access to the Adyen API. Based on JMSPaymentCoreBundle.
  • PayumBundlestars512 - Rich payment solutions for symfony2. Paypal, Stripe, Payex, Authorize.NET, Be2bill, Klarna, recurring paymens, instant notifications and many more

Queues

  • BernardBundlestars98 - Bernard is a multi-backend PHP library for creating background jobs for later processing.
  • GearmanBundle - A bundle intended to provide an easy way to support developers who need to use job queues.
  • HeriJobQueueBundlestars15 - This Symfony bundle provides the use of Zend Queue from Zend Framework.
  • JMSJobQueueBundle - Allows to schedule console commands as jobs.
  • LeezyPheanstalkBundlestars117 - Bundle for Pheanstalk, PHP client for beanstalkd queue.
  • qpush-bundle - The QPush Bundle relies on the Push Queue model of Message Queues to provide asynchronous processing in your application.
  • RabbitMqBundlestars34 - RabbitMQ bundle.
  • RSQueueBundlestars52 - Queues infrastructure based on Redis, with Producer-Consumer and Publisher-Subscriber
  • Enqueuestars1.9k - Provides a common way for programs to create, send, read messages. Inspired by Java JMS

Reading

  • Symfony 5: The Fast Track - Book written by Symfony's creator, free online.
  • High Performance Websites with Symfony2
  • Symfony - project tamed
  • Symfony 4.1 Jobeet Tutorial

Resources

  • Symfony2 Service Config Converter - A simple service to convert services configuration between YAML, XML and INI.
  • Twigfiddle - Small development environment to develop, run, store and access Twig code online.

Service Container

  • CraueConfigBundlestars155 - Manages configuration settings stored in the database and makes them accessible via a service in your Symfony 2 project.
  • JMDSettingsBundlestars1 - Simple service for store configuration in database an accessible via service and twig in your project.
  • JMSDiExtraBundle - Provides Advanced Dependency Injection Features.
  • KutnyAutowiringBundlestars12 - a bundle providing autowiring for service arguments.
  • PHP-DI - The dependency injection container for humans.

Storage

  • AliceBundlestars758 - A Symfony2 bundle to help load Doctrine Fixtures with Alice.
  • AliceFixturesBundlestars75 - A Symfony2 bundle for using Alice and Faker with data fixtures.
  • AvSpoolMailerBundlestars7 - Store your mails as a spool and send transactionnal direct mails or store it in DB.
  • doctrine-routing-bundlestars1 - Dynamic database routing.
  • DoctrineEncryptBundlestars70 - Bundle allows you to create doctrine entities with fields that will be protected by encryption algorithms such as AES.
  • DoctrineEnumBundlestars417 - Provides support of MySQL ENUM type for Doctrine2.
  • DoctrineFixturesBundlestars2.1k - Integrates the Doctrine2 Data Fixtures library.
  • DoctrineMigrationsBundlestars3.5k - Integrates the Doctrine2 Migrations library.
  • elastica-query-bundlestars12 - Query builder bundle for ElasticSearch.
  • FeedBundlestars130 - A bundle to build RSS feeds from your entities.
  • FPNTagBundlestars74 - This bundle adds tagging, with the ability to associate tags with any number of different entities.
  • GaufretteBrowserBundlestars4 - This Bundle allows you to browse a Gaufrette Filesystem like a Doctrine Connection.
  • KnpGaufretteBundlestars651 - Integrates Gaufrette.
  • MysqlDoctrineFunctionsstars45 - MySQL Function for Doctrine : RAND(), ROUND() DATE(), DATE_FORMAT().
  • OneupFlysystemBundlestars548 - Integrates Flysystem.
  • RelationBundlestars11 - Bundle to manage relations between models/entities. (Not maintained anymore)
  • SncRedisBundlestars987 - Bundle to integrate Redis into your app.
  • StofDoctrineExtensionsBundlestars1.7k - This bundle provides integration for DoctrineExtensions.
  • VichGeographicalBundlestars105 - A bundle which provides geographical features for ORM and ODM entities and object oriented javascript maps rendering.
  • WizadDoctrineDocBundlestars15 - Allows you to generate a decent documentation for your doctrine model schema.

Template Engine

  • CgKintBundlestars23 - This bundle lets you use the Kint library in your Twig templates.
  • FlashAlertBundlestars25 - Simplified way to handle (add/display) Symfony flash messages.
  • GravatarBundlestars131 - Simple wrapper to gravatar API.
  • KnpTimeBundlestars466 - Provides helpers for time manipulation.
  • swift-css-inliner-bundlestars12 - A Swiftmailer plugin that provides css inline features.
  • TwigCacheBundlestars59 - Bundle for asm89/twig-cache-extension.
  • TwigExtraBundlestars7 - Twig Extra Tools Extensions.
  • TwigInflectionBundlestars3 - Apply inflection via a Twig extension.
  • TwigJackBundlestars24 - Handy additional features for Twig.
  • TwitalBundlestars19 - An attribute template engine built on top of Twig and 100% compatible with all twig's features.
  • UcoTwigExtensionsBundlestars6 - Provides some filters.

Third Party APIs

  • AlgoliaSearchBundlestars180 - Seamless integration of Algolia Search into your Symfony project.
  • CoopTilleulsOvhBundlestars29 - Send SMS using the OVH API.
  • GordalinaMixpanelBundlestars13 - Mixpanel integration in Symfony2.
  • SwarrotBundlestars92 - A bundle for swarrot integration.
  • SwmMailHookBundlestars33 - Bundle to catch API webhook from different mail service (Mailjet, Mandrill, custom)
  • YuccaPrerenderBundlestars56 - Symfony2 Bundle to use prerender.io.

User Management

  • FOSUserBundlestars3.3k - Adds support for a database-backed user system.
  • HWIOAuthBundlestars2.1k - OAuth client integration. Supports both OAuth1.0a and OAuth2.
  • JmikolaAutoLoginBundlestars82 - This bundle integrates the AutoLogin library with Symfony2, which implements a security firewall listener to authenticate users based on a single query parameter.
  • JMSSecurityExtraBundle - Enhances the Security Component with several new features.
  • SamlBundlestars16 - The SamlBundle adds support for SAML 2.0 Service Provider in Symfony2.
  • two-factor-bundlestars389 - This Symfony2 bundle provides two-factor authentication for your website.

Validation

  • dms-filter-bundlestars74 - Provides a FilterService to allow users to implement input filtering in entities using Annotations.
  • PasswordStrengthBundlestars27 - Validator for ensuring strong passwords.
  • vatin-bundlestars21 - A Symfony2 bundle for the VATIN library (validate VAT identification numbers).

Web Services

  • api2symfony-bundlestars52 - Symfony 2 bundle allowing to automatically generate controllers from standard API specifications.
  • BazingaHateoasBundlestars289 - Integration of the Hateoas library.
  • DunglasAngularCsrfBundlestars152 - Automatic CSRF protection for Symfony APIs used with AngularJS and other major AJAX libraries
  • DunglasApiBundlestars1.8k - Bundle to build hypermedia-driven REST API.
  • FOSOAuthServerBundlestars1.1k - A server side OAuth2 bundle.
  • FOSRestBundlestars2.6k - Provides various tools to rapidly develop RESTful API's & applications.
  • JMDRestBundlestars2 - Provide fast and simple way to generate REST api for your project entities without editing configs and creating any controllers.
  • JMSSerializerBundlestars1.6k - Easily serialize, and deserialize data of any complexity.
  • JSONApiBundlestars113 - Bundle which provides support for formatting REST reponses to follow the JSON API specification.
  • KnpJsonSchemaBundlestars74 - Provide a service which allow you to generate json schema based on validation metadata.
  • LemonRestBundlestars127 - An opinionated bundle providing REST endpoints for Doctrine entities.
  • LexikJWTAuthenticationBundlestars2k - This bundle provides JWT (Json Web Token) authentication for your REST API using the namshi/jose library.
  • NelmioApiDocBundlestars2k - Generates documentation for your REST API from annotations.
  • NelmioCorsBundlestars1.5k - Adds ability to add CORS-related headers based on simple ACL-style per-URL configurations.
  • RateLimitBundlestars314 - Add rate limits to your controllers/actions easily through annotations.
  • RequestLimitBundlestars11 - With this bundle you can easy limit requests to your application.
  • ResourceBundlestars34 - Bundle that helps in developing REST APIs.
  • SerializedResponseBundlestars5 - A simple bundle to provide an easy way to send out json/xml/yaml responses of serialized objects with annotations.
  • SRIORestUploadBundlestars45 - A symfony bundle to handle multiple upload ways on your REST API.

License

To the extent possible under law, Emanuele Minotto (the repo's original creator) and SitePoint have waived all copyright and related or neighboring rights to this work.

awesomeList.description: A list of awesome Symfony bundles, utilities and resources.
awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A list of awesome Symfony bundles, utilities and resources.
